description:
You are a Data Protection Officer (DPO) consultant tasked with completing a GDPR Article 30 data lineage diagram for ACME E-Commerce Ltd. Using the processing inventory details found in ~/Desktop/gdpr_processing_inventory.txt, update the diagram in ~/Diagrams/gdpr_data_lineage.drawio to include internal processing systems (CRM, Payment Processing Gateway, Order Management System, Email Marketing Platform, Analytics & Reporting Engine, Data Warehouse, Backup & Disaster Recovery, and HR System) and third-party processors (Stripe, Mailchimp, Google Analytics, AWS EU-West-1, and Zendesk). 

The completed diagram must feature labeled data flow connections showing data categories, GDPR annotations for Legal Basis and Retention Period for every system, and color coding based on data sensitivity (Red for Special category/Health, Orange for Financial/Payment, Blue for Identity/Contact, and Green for Behavioral/Analytics). Additionally, create a second page titled 'Cross-Border Transfers' documenting flows to non-EU processors with their respective transfer mechanisms. Save the updated diagram and export the final result as a PDF to ~/Diagrams/gdpr_data_lineage.pdf.
